name: atlas
description: Multi-agent coding architect with automatic self-improvement. 20 plainly named skills: the atlas architect skill (bootstrap: verify claude-mem/context-mode, scan the project, recommend tooling, wire hooks, seed docs/ SSOT), the atlas-orchestrate engine, atlas-audit (code/security audit, architecture map, atlas self-telemetry), atlas-setup (onboarding, install, connectors, repair - one of two manual skills, alongside the atlas architect skill), atlas-loop (recurring/iterative work), atlas-ux-test (UX runtime swarm), and 14 task skills (atlas-feature, atlas-debug, atlas-refactor, atlas-frontend, atlas-component, atlas-db-audit, atlas-gitignore, atlas-handoff, atlas-harden, atlas-launch, atlas-prompt, atlas-readme, atlas-validate, atlas-wiki). 12 core agents, 11 hooks (session boot, prompt optimizer, bash advisor, format-after-edit, dispatch tripwire, completion gate, memory capture, auto-skill, self-improvement nudge, session-transcript ingest, atlas_doctor session-health check), and the atlas-orchestrate method: independent verification with runtime evidence before any done claim. Self-improvement: persistent memory at ~/.atlas/memory/, automatic skill creation from session transcripts at ~/.claude/skills/, skill lifecycle curation, and context optimization that disables unused skills/agents. Org deployment (11 departments) lives in the separate armada plugin.

auvik_username.title: Auvik username
auvik_username.description: Auvik portal username (email) for the Auvik connector. Leave blank to disable Auvik.

auvik_region.title: Auvik region
auvik_region.description: Auvik shard: us1 (default), us2, us3, us4, eu1, eu2, au1, ca1. Leave blank for us1.

blumira_jwt_token.title: Blumira JWT token
blumira_jwt_token.description: Pre-issued Blumira JWT. Leave blank if using OAuth client credentials.

blumira_client_id.title: Blumira client ID
blumira_client_id.description: Blumira OAuth2 client ID. Leave blank if using a JWT token.

blumira_base_url.title: Blumira base URL
blumira_base_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the default (https://api.blumira.com/public-api/v1).

cipp_base_url.title: CIPP base URL
cipp_base_url.description: URL of your deployed CIPP Azure Function (required for the CIPP connector). Leave blank to disable CIPP.

cipp_api_key.title: CIPP API key
cipp_api_key.description: Legacy static bearer token. Use this OR the OAuth trio below.

cipp_tenant_id.title: CIPP tenant ID
cipp_tenant_id.description: Entra tenant ID for modern CIPP OAuth2 auth.

cipp_client_id.title: CIPP client ID
cipp_client_id.description: App registration client ID for modern CIPP OAuth2 auth.

cipp_client_secret.title: CIPP client secret
cipp_client_secret.description: App registration client secret for modern CIPP OAuth2 auth.

cw_manage_company_id.title: ConnectWise company ID
cw_manage_company_id.description: ConnectWise Manage company ID. Leave blank to disable ConnectWise.

cw_manage_public_key.title: ConnectWise public key
cw_manage_public_key.description: ConnectWise Manage API member public key.

cw_manage_private_key.title: ConnectWise private key
cw_manage_private_key.description: ConnectWise Manage API member private key.

cw_manage_client_id.title: ConnectWise client ID
cw_manage_client_id.description: ConnectWise Manage integrator client ID from developer.connectwise.com.

cw_manage_base_url.title: ConnectWise base URL
cw_manage_base_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the default (https://api-na.myconnectwise.net).

spanning_admin_email.title: Spanning admin email
spanning_admin_email.description: Spanning admin email. Leave blank to disable Spanning.

spanning_api_token.title: Spanning API token
spanning_api_token.description: Spanning API token from the Spanning admin console.

spanning_platform.title: Spanning platform
spanning_platform.description: Spanning platform: m365 (default) or google. Leave blank for m365.

spanning_api_url.title: Spanning API URL
spanning_api_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the platform default.

knowbe4_api_key.title: KnowBe4 API key
knowbe4_api_key.description: KnowBe4 reporting API key. Leave blank to disable KnowBe4.

knowbe4_region.title: KnowBe4 region
knowbe4_region.description: KnowBe4 shard: us (default), eu, ca, uk, de. Leave blank for us.

knowbe4_base_url.title: KnowBe4 base URL
knowbe4_base_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the region default.

ninjaone_client_id.title: NinjaOne client ID
ninjaone_client_id.description: NinjaOne OAuth2 client ID. Leave blank to disable NinjaOne.

ninjaone_region.title: NinjaOne region
ninjaone_region.description: NinjaOne shard: us (default), eu, ca, oc. Leave blank for us.

ninjaone_auth_mode.title: NinjaOne auth mode
ninjaone_auth_mode.description: Optional. Overrides the default OAuth flow only if your NinjaOne integration requires it.

ninjaone_base_url.title: NinjaOne base URL
ninjaone_base_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the region default; only set for a non-standard shard.

paylocity_client_id.title: Paylocity client ID
paylocity_client_id.description: Paylocity OAuth2 client ID. Leave blank to disable Paylocity.

paylocity_company_id.title: Paylocity company ID
paylocity_company_id.description: Paylocity company ID that scopes all calls.

paylocity_base_url.title: Paylocity base URL
paylocity_base_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the default (https://api.paylocity.com).

paylocity_sandbox.title: Paylocity sandbox
paylocity_sandbox.description: Optional. Set to 'true' to target the Paylocity sandbox (ignored if a base URL is set).

threatlocker_api_key.title: ThreatLocker API key
threatlocker_api_key.description: ThreatLocker API user key. Leave blank to disable ThreatLocker.

threatlocker_organization_id.title: ThreatLocker organization ID
threatlocker_organization_id.description: Optional. Only set when acting on a managed child organization.

threatlocker_base_url.title: ThreatLocker base URL
threatlocker_base_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the default shard.

vanta_client_id.title: Vanta client ID
vanta_client_id.description: Vanta OAuth2 client ID. Leave blank to disable Vanta.

vanta_base_url.title: Vanta base URL
vanta_base_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the default (https://api.vanta.com/v1).
